title: Senior Software Engineer - Lenovo India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lenovo India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Lenovo India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Chandigarh operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Lenovo India:
Lenovo India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenovo India!
jsonLd.skills: MongoDB, JavaScript, Java, Go, REST APIs, AWS, React, Machine Learning
